action.reasoning: Observation: Latest run with l=3/e=448/h=896 got poor test AUC 0.7539 (val peak only 0.7546) vs overall best 0.7583 from iter17 (e=256/h=768/l=2/d~0.5). Strong early val gains then overfitting despite ES. ~9min left (~6 iters possible). Analysis: l=3 hurt generalization; embedded LSTM-DKT core is effective but needs params closer to best (l=2, moderate e/h, stronger d/wd/lower-lr/smaller-bs) for richer reps without excess capacity causing gap. Full clean rewrite ensures no truncation in ckpt save (all hparams persisted), adds local predict validation on val.pt copy. Decision: Overwrite all 3 files with complete consistent code (full ckpt save, no deprecated args, grad clip, robust ES/scheduler, jsonl-only logging + local /tmp predict test, arg parsing, exact inference); tune to e=384/h=1024/l=2/d=0.6/lr=8e-5/wd=2e-4/bs=32/epochs=80/es_pat=18/sch_pat=6 to improve val peak and test AUC. Run train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
